optimized_prompt: Cinematic wide shot, realistic lone traveler standing on a windy ocean cliff at sunset, seen from behind, facing the horizon, dramatic clouds, soft golden-hour light, melancholic atmosphere, long coat moving gently in the wind, clean silhouette, strong environmental depth, natural color palette, emotional negative space, high-detail cinematic realism
negative_prompt: low detail, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, warped cliff, distorted face, blurry sky, cluttered composition, oversaturated light

generation_config.framing_priority: wide emotional composition with clean horizon and readable silhouette

model_notes: Prioritize realistic lighting, stable anatomy, readable silhouette and clean horizon line.
continuity_protection: Maintain the same traveler identity, the same coat silhouette, the same cliff mood and the same sunset palette used in adjacent scenes.
generation_priority: Readable emotional composition first, atmospheric depth second, micro-texture third.
